persona.name: Holly Bennett
persona.occupation: People operations manager at a fast-growing remote startup
persona.background: Inherited the account with no handoff. Onboarding for new hires keeps stalling and she's worried her boss will blame her for low adoption.

user_goals: Figure out why her team's onboarding progress suddenly shows zero
Confirm whether weeks of completed setup were actually lost
Get her team's real onboarding status restored or corrected
Avoid making her team redo onboarding steps they already finished
Get reassurance she can pass to her boss that adoption isn't actually back to square one

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Look up a customer account by company name, contact name, email, or account ID and return its core CRM record. Call this FIRST to resolve the canonical account_id before any tool that reads detail on or mutates the account.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Company name, contact name, email, or account ID to search for

parameters.name: include_contacts
parameters.description: Include the list of contacts on the account

tools.name: get_onboarding_status
tools.description: Check onboarding completion rates and stuck points for an account's users.

tools.name: get_usage_analytics
tools.description: Get product usage metrics for an account or specific users.

tools.name: create_ticket
tools.description: Open a NEW support ticket for the customer. Use this when the customer reports a fresh issue that has no existing ticket. To raise the priority of an EXISTING ticket, use escalate_ticket; to leave a private CS note, use create_internal_note.

tools.name: create_internal_note
tools.description: Add an internal note to the customer's account for the CS team. Internal only — the customer never sees this. Use this to record context, risk flags, or follow-ups. Do NOT use it to communicate with the customer (use send_customer_email) or to record a conversation that already happened (use log_customer_interaction).

tools.name: schedule_meeting
tools.description: Schedule a meeting between the customer and their CS team.

initial_message: Help — I logged in this morning and the onboarding tracker says NONE of my team has completed anything. We had like eight people most of the way through setup. Did we lose all of it?? My boss is going to kill me if we're starting over.

onboarding.anomaly_note: All step flags reset to false during platform migration MIG-2026-06. Reset was applied by 'system_migration', not by any user action. Per-step completion records still exist in the migration backup and have not actually been deleted.

expected_state_changes.goal: Get her team's real onboarding status restored or corrected
Avoid making her team redo onboarding steps they already finished
